positive: A cyberpunk cityscape scene viewed from a rainy rooftop. Neon signs illuminate towering, futuristic skyscrapers and flying vehicles. The style should be highly detailed digital art with deep shadows and vibrant cyan, magenta, and electric blue accents. Cinematic, synthwave aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, soft lighting, pastel colors, watercolor
